evidence_quotes.quote: Games such as The Crew getting shut down without any reimbursion or any way of playing it is deeply frustrating.
protections from any game publisher that can destroy any video games.

paragraphs.text: Hello! I am writing as a non european country (by technically, since I am Norwegian) and request that customers should have protections from any game publisher that can destroy any video games. This is especially frustrating to a lot of gamers such as myself, that get affected by this quite a lot. Games such as The Crew getting shut down without any reimbursion or any way of playing it is deeply frustrating. It sets a precident that publishers are free to do as they want with any video game as they seem fit. Thank you for reading!
